info.name: Acronis Notary API
info.description:
Enables notarization, electronic signature, and authenticity verification of files and JSON objects of any size by using the Ethereum blockchain.

Usage Guide [https://developer.acronis.com/doc/notary/v2/guide/](https://developer.acronis.com/doc/notary/v2/guide/)

Full Reference [https://developer.acronis.com/doc/notary/v2/reference/](https://developer.acronis.com/doc/notary/v2/reference/)

Copyright © 2019-2024 Acronis International GmbH. This is distributed under MIT license.

urlencoded.description: The Time-based One-Time Password (TOTP) code required for accounts with two-factor authentication (2FA) enabled.

request.description: For Cyber Files API other type of grant type than for Account Management API. It must be grant_type equals password.
